description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the default stage (test). Use the default GitLab CI Docker image and execute the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python3-dev flatpak python3-pyqt5 python3-pyqt5.qtquick python3-dateutil qml-module-qtquick2 qml-module-qtquick-layouts qml-module-qtquick-controls2 qml-module-qtquick-window2, then change directory to test and run python3 -m unittest. No caches, artifacts, or explicit rules/only/except are defined, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
